content: it's totally definitely not the case that World-Ending Inferno can also draw her Rouse card or anything

Hello guys!

Like I mentioned before, we have started reworking the first arc’s main story English translation with a professional;

Since some of our volunteers have already edited the existing early chapters, I have sent them the volunteer contributed version, so they’ll be working based on your version!

Me and our writers will be monitoring the translation reworking closely; we’ll also strive to not change things from your translation, unless we find it necessary.
<@678107120591306773>  Prologue edits and <@88644018673582080> ’ Chapter 4&5 edits will take effect in game after the hotfix on next Monday!

We will update the English translation of the entire Arc 1 main story on our 2nd Anniversary. When that happens, some of the lines may be updated again for style consistency.

From this day on, we will **stop accepting further edits to the Arc 1 Main Story English translation** so we don’t waste your time and energy.
Also: I’ve started working with the operations team to prepare more rewards for our volunteers! Details are still under discussion <:celeste_pray:1408324281624170566>

Yay, I'm excited to hear that! I'll start working on the side stories instead then. Are there plans for the professional work to continue on to the Arc 2 main story after Arc 1 is completed, or should we be working on that as volunteers?

Also, since I haven't gotten the NDA yet, I'm not too sure what is covered by it. Are we allowed to mention that there's currently work ongoing to retranslate all of Arc 1 professionally, or should we keep that to ourselves for now? Mostly wondering as there tends to be a lot of questioning about timeframes in the official discord, where people are asking when the translations will be updated.

Lastly, is there any chance the professional would be willing to join the Discord here? It would be really nice to get some feedback on them and be able to discuss/collaborate with them on term choices or names, etc <:auritacry:1396906080516440278>

Also as a side note, I submitted a pull request a few days ago with my current ch6 progress which should be a bit over halfway done - I'll stop work on it now that we have the professional working on it, but just thought I'd mention it since that should save them a pretty considerable chunk of work on ch6 as well
